caption: A woman with dark curly hair tied in a top knot wears a dark green t-shirt with a red and white graphic on the chest and black headphones. She sits in a studio setting in front of a black backdrop featuring the white text "BOSS TALK 101", "It's A Unique Hustle", "CAST", and "About It!". A black professional microphone is positioned in front of her. To her left, a framed picture of a person is visible on the wall. On-screen text banners at the bottom of the frame include "MZ. JAMAKIA" and "BOSS TALK 101". As the scene progresses, the woman is initially seen looking toward the microphone and gesturing with her hand. She then shifts her gaze and expression, eventually turning her head slightly to the right with a focused or skeptical facial expression while remaining seated before the microphone.
